generated_oml:
instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the gantry crane system supporting all mechanical components"
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling horizontal movement of the crane cart"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling vertical movement of the crane hoist"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical component used to pick up and release container pucks"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Microcontroller interfacing with motors, electromagnet, and sensors for crane control"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electrical power supply for crane electronics and motors"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures swinging motion of the crane hoist"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed affecting crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors current draw from crane motors for fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance PositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures precise position of crane cart and hoist"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionEncoder
]

instance ControllerFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoController
]

instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD representation created in Autodesk Fusion 360 showing crane physical structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler, SimulationService
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model representing crane kinematics for trajectory generation and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance HistoricalCraneData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data including crane state, trajectories, and environmental conditions stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, MotorCurrentData, PositionData, ControllerFeedbackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance RealTimeCraneState : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live measurements of crane position, velocity, and swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, PositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlApplicationService, TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance EnvironmentalConditions : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental data including wind speed affecting crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance SimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output from crane behavior simulations used for validation and testing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService, GrafanaEnabler
]

instance PythonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming environment implementing control logic, logging, and interface components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlApplicationService, LoggingApplicationService, PhysicalCraneInterfaceService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database optimized for storing and querying crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization platform for creating interactive dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying database, broker, and dashboard services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, MQTTBrokerService, DashboardService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker facilitating communication between distributed services"
    DTDFVocab:enables CommunicationService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller platform for sensor data collection and motor control"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterfaceService
]

instance KiCadEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Electronic design automation tool for creating custom hardware shields"
    DTDFVocab:enables HardwareDevelopmentService
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control and collaboration platform for open-source development"
    DTDFVocab:enables SoftwareDevelopmentService
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python program connecting to crane controllers and Arduino for real-time communication"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateDataCollectionInsight
]

instance ControlApplicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages crane control logic based on real-time state and trajectory commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneControlExecutionAction, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance LoggingApplicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously logs crane state data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingAction
]

instance HMIService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operator interface for crane control and monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorInteractionAction
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance storing all crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageAction
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard visualizing crane state and trajectory data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationAction
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model considering environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane behavior and controller performance for testing and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneSimulationAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares executed trajectories with simulations to detect deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationAction, OperationalAlertInsight
]

instance CommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating message exchange between all digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:provides InterServiceCommunicationAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Classifies anomalies in crane behavior using time-series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, FaultClassificationAction
]

instance HardwareDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Development of custom hardware components"
]

instance SoftwareDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Software development and maintenance"
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Message broker facilitating communication between distributed services"
    DTDFVocab:provides InterServiceCommunicationAction
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies most efficient paths for crane movement considering kinematics and environmental conditions"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Classifies anomalies in crane behavior using time-series classification techniques"
]

instance OperationalAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Notifies operators of deviations or faults via Grafana dashboard"
]

instance CraneStateDataCollectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Collects real-time state data from crane components"
]

instance OperatorInteractionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Provides interface for operator crane control and monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables adjustments to control strategies based on real-time data and simulations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates and implements optimized crane trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Validates real-time crane behavior against simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataLoggingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuously logs crane state data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Displays crane state and trajectory data on Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneControlExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes control commands for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneSimulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Simulates crane behavior for validation and testing"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Validates executed trajectories against simulations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InterServiceCommunicationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Facilitates message exchange between services"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultClassificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Classifies anomalies in crane behavior"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataStorageAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Stores crane operational data in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system for gantry crane"
    base:contains CentralizedDigitalTwinSystem
]

instance CentralizedDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized implementation containing all digital twin components and services"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance PhysicalCraneComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Actual hardware gantry crane system"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, ArduinoController, PowerSupplyUnit
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance ControlComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages crane control logic and trajectory execution"
    base:contains ControlApplicationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance LoggingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles continuous data logging of crane operations"
    base:contains LoggingApplicationService, DatabaseService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance InterfaceComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Provides operator interaction and system monitoring"
    base:contains HMIService, DashboardService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance TrajectoryComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Generates and validates optimal crane trajectories"
    base:contains TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance CommunicationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Facilitates message exchange between all system components"
    base:contains CommunicationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance FaultDetectionComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Monitors crane behavior for anomalies and faults"
    base:contains FaultDetectionService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin interacts with the physical system through:
  - **Optimal trajectory generation**: The Trajectory Generator Service computes trajectories for the crane to follow, ensuring minimal residual swinging motion.
  - **Control commands**: Sent from the Control Application to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates these commands to the crane's motors.
  - **Operator inputs**: Via the Human Machine Interface (HMI), operators can configure and control the crane."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates in real-time, with continuous synchronization between the physical and virtual systems. Data is logged and validated in real-time, and services like trajectory generation and validation are executed dynamically during crane operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin system is orchestrated as follows:
  - The **Physical Crane** is controlled via the **Physical Crane Interface** and **Control Application**.
  - The **Logging Application** continuously logs crane state to the **TimescaleDB Database**.
  - The **Trajectory Generator Service** computes optimal trajectories, which are executed by the **Control Application**.
  - The **Simulation Service** validates trajectories against real-time data, with results visualized in the **Grafana Dashboard**.
  - The **Continuous Validation Service** monitors deviations and alerts operators via the dashboard.
  - The **MQTT Broker** facilitates communication between services, ensuring real-time synchronization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the following lifecycle phases of the physical system:
  - **As operated**: The digital twin is primarily used for real-time monitoring, control, and validation of the crane during operation.
  - **As designed**: CAD models and kinematic models represent the crane's design, but the twin is not used for manufacturing validation in this exemplar."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The digital twin employs the following fidelity and validity mechanisms:
  - **Continuous validation**: Compares real-time crane trajectories with simulations to detect deviations.
  - **Distance metrics**: Quantifies discrepancies between executed and simulated trajectories.
  - **Threshold-based alerts**: Operators are notified if deviations exceed acceptable thresholds.
  - **Simulation accuracy**: The kinematic model and simulation service are validated against real-world crane behavior.
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Environmental factors (e.g., wind speed) are accounted for in simulations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical and digital twin includes:
  - **Network Protocols**: MQTT (via Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication.
  - **Data Transmission**: Real-time data (e.g., crane state, sensor readings) is transmitted from the Arduino to the Logging Application and other services.
  - **Control Commands**: Generated by the Control Application and sent to the Physical Crane Interface via Python."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Local Deployment**: All software runs on a single personal computer connected to the physical crane.
  - **Containerization**: The database, MQTT broker, and dashboard are containerized using Docker for easy setup and scalability.
  - **Python Module**: The gantrylib module bundles all Python applications, making it easy to install and extend via pip."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin exemplar adheres to the following standards and practices:
  - **Open-source licensing**: Published under the MIT license.
  - **Common technologies**: Uses widely adopted tools (e.g., Python, Docker, MQTT, TimescaleDB).
  - **C4 Model**: For architecture documentation.
  - **AutomationML**: Mentioned in related work but not directly used in this exemplar."
]
